message:
fix: resolve stale missions closure in sendMessage and clear WS reconnect timer on unmount (#3322, #3318) (#3341)

- Use a missionsRef to always read the latest missions state when building
  conversation history in sendMessage, preventing the AI agent from missing
  the most recent user message (#3322).
- Track the WebSocket auto-reconnect setTimeout handle in a ref and clear it
  in the cleanup effect so reconnection attempts do not survive unmount (#3318).

Co-authored-by: andy anderson <andy@andys-MacBook-Pro.local>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
